name: xiaohongshu-studio
description: A self-media editorial toolkit for producing Xiaohongshu (RedNote) style poster carousels from articles, links, or books. v1.3 series adds IP-grade operations: series planning, multi-platform adaptation, persona library, and full contract-freeze back-compat. v1.4.1 mega-skill: single SKILL.md entry point.
descriptionZh: 自媒体图文生产套件 v1.4.1 mega-skill：单一 SKILL.md 入口，含 9-stage 编排流水线 + 3 独立 skill + 2 共享 utility。v1.3 阶段 IP 运营能力 + 完整 M27 迁移工具链 + 6th self-review 收口。完全向后兼容 v1.2 / v1.3.x。
